ai_summary: Interarch Building Solutions Limited has commenced commercial production at its new Gujarat facility, significantly boosting manufacturing capacity by 20,000 MT to a total of 221,000 MT, representing a nearly 10% increase. This INR 60 Crore investment, fully funded by internal accruals, aims to meet growing customer demand and enhance operational efficiencies. The expansion, implemented while existing capacity was 80% utilized, suggests a strategic move for long-term growth with no apparent red flags.
